checkin.journal:
Was a after party day, tired but loved it.
Woke up late 8:00 
Talked to my dad was his bd and congratulated him for NY
Been super tired whole day of course
Breakfast played pool with domen david
We watched the Houting in venice poirot detective
We played UNO
We ate hamburgers in Eleven Green omg soo good - we were very happy with it
We went with buggy in the hood - we went to spinnys to get some food
We spied on neighbours a bit
Was cool coz we were all a bit tired
Inspired by: the burger joint
